And you might have multiple avatars, but it's basically, it's just a way of picturing the person you're writing to in your list. You got to remember, you're writing to individuals. So when you create your avatar, it's a way for you to understand who you're writing to. You have to be real clear on who you're writing to in your emails. You have to understand their hopes, their dreams, their fears, their aspirations. What keeps them up at night? What makes them tick? For example, Beck, when I started, I was teaching about the stock market. I was teaching about stock market trading. I was actually teaching about stock market trading and stock market investing. ## [03:00 - 06:00]

Most of them were male, like 90%. And I think that's changed since then. This is 18 years ago. So I think it's changed, but back then, it was predominantly male. You need to get that kind of clarity, whatever you're publishing about, whether it might be learning guitar, or meditation, or English as a second language, or whatever, no matter what your market, you have to be able to picture that avatar. You have to be able to speak to their hopes, their dreams, their fears, their aspirations. My coach, Dan Sullivan, calls it the DOS, D-O-S. What are their dangers? What are their opportunities?
